name: Credit Diva
description_short: Houston-based credit repair service offering dispute assistance and credit rebuilding plans. Serves individuals and couples nationwide with fee-based credit repair and Chexsystems dispute services.
description_long:
Credit Diva Credit Services is headquartered in Houston, Texas at 2646 South Loop West, Suite 566, and operates under the leadership of Valerie Wells, the company's founder. The company has been operating for several years and markets itself as one of the top credit repair services, claiming to serve clients nationwide despite its Texas base. The business maintains an active social media presence, particularly on Facebook, where it shares credit and finance tips and customer testimonials.

Credit Diva offers three primary service offerings: individual credit repair for one person at $200, couple credit repair for two individuals at $350, and Chexsystems report disputes at $75 per person. All packages include analysis of overall credit status, disputes of items on credit reports, a customized plan of action for credit rebuilding, and a credit repair guide with tips. The company positions itself as a service that helps clients actively participate in the credit repair process, enabling them to take control of their finances and understand how to avoid future credit problems.

The company emphasizes client engagement and personal guidance, with Valerie Wells described as going "above and beyond to ensure that her clients are active participants in the process." The website highlights success stories and photographs of clients whose credit scores have increased. The service model requires clients to adhere to assigned responsibilities and maintain active participation, with consequences for non-compliance including reinstatement fees of $145 after 60 days of inactivity or restarting at the full $200 fee after 6 months of inactivity.

The company operates a straightforward business model with no refunds offered due to immediate work beginning on disputes. Contact is available via phone at (713) 665-7100 or email at wvalerie@swbell.net. The website includes an online contact form and maintains pages for pricing, guidelines, and account management.

In the broader ecosystem of credit repair services, consumers have multiple paths to improving their credit. Professional credit repair companies can dispute inaccurate items with all three bureaus, while credit monitoring services provide ongoing alerts about changes to your reports. For those building credit from scratch, secured credit cards and credit builder loans offer structured approaches. Consumers dealing with overwhelming debt may benefit from debt consolidation loans to simplify payments, or credit counseling through nonprofit agencies for personalized budgeting guidance. Consumers who successfully repair their credit often find better rates on installment loans, secured credit cards, and other financial products.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Transparent, tiered pricing structure clearly displayed ($200 for individuals, $350 for couples, $75 for Chexsystems)
Nationwide service availability despite Houston headquarters location
Includes Chexsystems dispute service in addition to standard credit report disputes
Advertises active client participation model rather than passive service
Direct access to founder Valerie Wells via phone and email for customer questions
Multiple service packages tailored to different client needs (individual vs. couple vs. banking disputes)
Claims established track record with before-and-after customer testimonials on social media
cons: Non-refundable fees despite immediate work beginning—customer assumes financial risk if dissatisfied
Reinstatement fees ($145) and requirement to restart ($200) penalize clients for 60+ days of inactivity, creating additional costs beyond initial service
Minimal information provided on website regarding dispute success rates, timeline to results, or specific methodology
No mention of FCRA compliance, certifications, regulatory oversight, or legal disclaimers typical of credit repair services
Limited operational transparency—no staff information, years in business, or verifiable credentials provided
best_for: Couples looking to repair credit together and seeking a bundled service discount
Individuals with Chexsystems report issues needing specialized dispute assistance
Consumers in Texas or with local ties who value direct access to the founder
Clients who want hands-on guidance and active participation in their credit repair process
diagnosis: Credit Diva is best suited for individuals or couples seeking hands-on credit repair with direct founder involvement, particularly those with Chexsystems issues. The main caveat is the non-refundable fee structure and lack of published success metrics, regulatory information, or transparent dispute methodology—consumers should research the company independently and understand that results are not guaranteed despite upfront payment.
services: Credit report analysis and overall credit status review
Dispute filing for items on credit reports
Customized credit rebuilding plan of action
Credit repair guide and financial tips
Online account management and member portal
Social media support and client testimonial tracking
Financial goal coaching (toward home ownership and credit improvement)
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
